title: TreeTimber
body:
# 🌲 Timber - Efficient Tree Felling in Minecraft

**Timber** is a lightweight and powerful plugin that allows players to
fell entire trees using any axe, making resource collection faster,
smoother, and more enjoyable in your Minecraft world.

Perfect for survival servers that want to improve gameplay quality
without breaking vanilla balance.

## ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/925403/description_d8b54d67-e16f-4662-9392-b1f56147c9e1.gif)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## ✨ Features

-   Chop entire trees instantly
-   Works with **any axe**
-   Per-player enable / disable support
-   Permission-based usage control
-   PlaceholderAPI integration
-   Leaderboard support (Top players tracking)
-   Compatible with popular survival plugins
-   Lightweight and optimized performance
-   Admin GUI for easy configuration

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 🔌 Supported Plugins

Timber integrates smoothly with popular server plugins:

-   **WorldGuard** -- Prevents tree felling inside protected regions
-   **PlaceholderAPI** -- Provides placeholders for stats and status
    tracking
-   **mcMMO** -- Fully compatible with woodcutting leveling systems
-   **Quests** -- Allows tree chopping progress to count toward quest
    objectives
-   **AuraSkills** -- Supports skill progression systems

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 📊 PlaceholderAPI Support

Timber provides multiple placeholders for statistics and player status
tracking.

### 🔹 Player Placeholders

-----------------------------------------------------------------------
Placeholder                        Description
---------------------------------- ------------------------------------
`%timber_status%`                  Shows whether tree felling is
                                   enabled for the player (`true` /
                                   `false`)

`%timber_chopedtrees%`             Shows how many trees the player has
                                   chopped
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### 🏆 Leaderboard Placeholders

  Placeholder               Description
  ------------------------- -----------------------------------
  `%timber_top_1%`          Player ranked #1 by chopped trees
  `%timber_top_1_amount%`   Trees chopped by the #1 player
  `%timber_top_2%`          Player ranked #2
  `%timber_top_2_amount%`   Trees chopped by the #2 player
  `%timber_top_3%`          Player ranked #3
  `%timber_top_3_amount%`   Trees chopped by the #3 player

You can use **any leaderboard position number**, for example:

    %timber_top_5%
    %timber_top_10_amount%

Example:

    Top player: %timber_top_1%
    Your trees: %timber_chopedtrees%
    Status: %timber_status%

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 🛠️ Installation

1.  Upload the plugin `.jar` file into your `/plugins` folder
2.  Restart your server
3.  Configure the plugin if needed

> ⚠ Note: This plugin is **not a mod**. If you are looking for the
> **TreeTimber mod**, download it here: `[insert mod link here]`

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 🎮 Commands

### 🔹 User Commands

  Command     Description
  ----------- --------------------------------
  `/timber`   Opens the player settings menu

### 🔹 Admin Commands

Requires permission:

    timber.admin

  Command            Description
  ------------------ -----------------------------------
  `/timber admin`    Opens the admin configuration GUI
  `/timber reload`   Reloads plugin configuration

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 🔑 Permissions

  Permission             Description
  ---------------------- -----------------------------------------------
  `timber.capitate`      Allows players to chop entire trees
  `timber.useparticle`   Enables particle effects while chopping
  `timber.admin`         Grants access to admin GUI and reload command

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## ⚙️ Configuration Highlights

Server owners can control:

-   Permission-based access
-   Particle effects usage
-   Player toggle support
-   Compatibility behavior with protection plugins
-   Leaderboard tracking system

More customization options coming soon 🚀

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 🧠 Why Choose Timber?

Timber is designed to stay:

-   Fast
-   Clean
-   Compatible
-   Survival-friendly
-   Easy to configure

It enhances gameplay without changing Minecraft's core mechanics.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 🚧 Development Status

⚠ This is **not the final version** of Timber!

More exciting features are planned:

-   Advanced configuration options
-   More PlaceholderAPI stats
-   Additional integrations
-   Performance improvements
-   Expanded GUI settings

Suggestions and feedback are always welcome 💬

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## 💬 Support & Community
